body:
If you mean **Pleasanton, California** , a full garage door replacement (new door plus professional installation) typically costs:

  * **About $1,500–$3,500** for a standard single- or double-car steel garage door with installation. [Garage Door Replacement Cost [2026] | Pricing Guide](https://a1garage.com/garage-door-replacement-cost-in-2025/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Replacement Cost 2026: Complete Price Breakdown | The Garage Guide](https://thegarage.guide/cost-guides/garage-door-replacement-cost?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Around $2,000–$5,000+** is common in the Bay Area for insulated doors, upgraded designs, windows, or higher local labor costs. [Garage Door Replacement Cost Guide (2026 Prices)](https://hotianwindows.com/garage-door-replacement-cost/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Premium materials such as wood, composite, or full-view glass doors can run **$5,000–$12,000+ installed**. [Garage Door Replacement Cost Guide (2026 Prices)](https://hotianwindows.com/garage-door-replacement-cost/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

For Pleasanton specifically, one local cost guide reports installed prices of roughly:

  * **$1,300–$2,900** for a basic 8-ft steel door.

  * **$2,400–$5,100** for a standard 16-ft double steel door.

  * **$3,500–$7,000** for an insulated 16-ft steel door. [Garage Door Replacement Cost Guide (2026 Prices)](https://hotianwindows.com/garage-door-replacement-cost/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### Quick rule of thumb

For a typical Pleasanton home replacing a standard two-car garage door, I'd expect **about $2,500–$4,500 all-in** once you include the door, labor, haul-away of the old door, new tracks/hardware, and taxes. [Garage Door Replacement Cost [2026] | Pricing Guide](https://a1garage.com/garage-door-replacement-cost-in-2025/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Replacement Cost Guide (2026 Prices)](https://hotianwindows.com/garage-door-replacement-cost/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you tell me:

  1. Single-car or double-car door,

  2. Whether it's insulated,

  3. Whether you're replacing the opener too,

I can give a much tighter estimate.
